501.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "When a woman gives in charity from her husband's house, she will have a reward for it, and the husband will have a similar reward, and the treasurer will have a similar reward — and none of them diminishes the reward of the other in the slightest. The husband's reward is for what he earns, and her reward is for what she spends."
501.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Ketika seorang istri bersedekah dari rumah suaminya, ia akan mendapat pahala, dan suami akan mendapat pahala serupa, dan penjaga harta akan mendapat pahala serupa — dan tidak seorang pun di antara mereka yang mengurangi pahala yang lain sedikit pun. Pahala suami karena apa yang ia usahakan, dan pahalanya karena apa yang ia nafkahkan."

502.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when Abu Hurayrah was told of her statement on a matter, he said: "Aisha knows better about the Messenger of Allah ﷺ."
502.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Abu Hurairah diberitahu pernyataannya tentang suatu masalah, ia berkata: "Aisyah lebih mengetahui tentang Rasulullah ﷺ."

503.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that on a day of Eid al-Fitr or Eid al-Adha, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was with her and two young girls were beating tambourines. Abu Bakr rebuked them, but the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Leave them, O Abu Bakr. Every people has their celebration, and this day is our celebration."
503.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa pada hari Idul Fitri atau Idul Adha, Rasulullah ﷺ bersamanya dan dua gadis kecil sedang memukul rebana. Abu Bakar menegur mereka, tetapi Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Biarkan mereka, wahai Abu Bakar. Setiap kaum memiliki perayaannya, dan hari ini adalah perayaan kita."

504.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that while the Prophet ﷺ was in i'tikaf in the mosque, she would come and he would lean his head out for her to comb it — and she was menstruating.
504.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ sedang beri'tikaf di masjid, ia datang dan beliau mengeluarkan kepalanya agar ia bisa menyisirnya — sementara ia sedang haid.

505.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked to share a supplication the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to make often, and she said: "He frequently used to say: 'O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done and from the evil of what I have not done.'"
505.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia diminta untuk berbagi doa yang sering diucapkan Rasulullah ﷺ, dan ia berkata: "Beliau sering mengucapkan: 'Ya Allah, aku berlindung kepada-Mu dari keburukan apa yang telah aku perbuat dan dari keburukan apa yang belum aku perbuat.'"

506.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say frequently in his bowing and prostration: "Subhanaka Allahumma Rabbana wa bihamdika, Allahumma ighfir li (Glory be to You, O Allah our Lord, and praise. O Allah, forgive me)."
506.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ sering mengucapkan dalam ruku dan sujudnya: "Subhanakallahumma Rabbana wa bihamdika, Allahummaghfirli (Maha Suci Engkau, ya Allah Rabb kami, dan segala puji bagi-Mu. Ya Allah, ampunilah aku)."

507.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Breaking the bone of a deceased person is like breaking the bone of a living person." She was narrating from the Prophet ﷺ.
507.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Mematahkan tulang orang yang sudah meninggal seperti mematahkan tulang orang yang masih hidup." Ia meriwayatkan dari Nabi ﷺ.

508.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When dawn broke, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would pray two rak'ahs — only two rak'ahs — in which he would recite Al-Fatihah."
508.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika fajar terbit, Rasulullah ﷺ shalat dua rakaat — hanya dua rakaat — yang di dalamnya beliau membaca Al-Fatihah."

509.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked about a man who prayed sitting due to illness, she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray standing for a long part of the night and sitting for another long part. When he recited while standing, he would bow while standing; and when he recited while sitting, he would bow while sitting."
509.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya tentang seorang laki-laki yang shalat sambil duduk karena sakit, ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat berdiri dalam waktu lama di malam hari dan duduk dalam waktu lama lainnya. Ketika beliau membaca dalam keadaan berdiri, beliau ruku dalam keadaan berdiri; dan ketika membaca dalam keadaan duduk, beliau ruku dalam keadaan duduk."

510.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray thirteen rak'ahs at night."
510.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat tiga belas rakaat di malam hari."

511.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I know what the talbiyah of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was like." She then recited: "Labbayk Allahumma labbayk, labbayk la sharika laka labbayk, innal hamda wan-ni'mata laka (Here I am, O Allah, here I am. Here I am, You have no partner, here I am. Surely all praise, grace and sovereignty belong to You)."
511.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku tahu seperti apa talbiyah Rasulullah ﷺ." Ia kemudian melafalkan: "Labbaikallahumma labbaik, labbaika la syarika laka labbaik, innal hamda wan-ni'mata laka (Aku datang memenuhi panggilan-Mu, ya Allah, aku datang. Aku datang, tiada sekutu bagi-Mu, aku datang. Sesungguhnya segala pujian, nikmat dan kekuasaan adalah milik-Mu)."

512.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed Witr at every part of the night, and his Witr settled in the last part of the night before dawn."
512.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ shalat Witir di setiap bagian malam, dan Witir beliau menetap di penghujung malam menjelang fajar."

513.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When the final verses of Surah Al-Baqarah were revealed, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ went out and recited them in the mosque, and thus trade in wine was forbidden."
513.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika ayat-ayat terakhir Surah Al-Baqarah diturunkan, Rasulullah ﷺ keluar dan membacakannya di masjid, dan dengan demikian perdagangan khamr diharamkan."

514.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to have sweet water fetched for him from the wells of al-Suqya.
514.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa meminta diambilkan air tawar dari sumur-sumur al-Suqya.

515.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The pen has been lifted from three: from the sleeping person until he wakes, from the child until he reaches puberty, and from the insane person until he regains his reason."
515.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Pena telah diangkat dari tiga orang: dari orang yang tidur hingga ia bangun, dari anak kecil hingga ia baligh, dan dari orang gila hingga ia kembali waras."

516.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Hand me the prayer mat." She said: "I am menstruating." He said: "Your menstruation is not in your hand."
516.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Berikan kepadaku tikar shalat." Ia berkata: "Aku sedang haid." Beliau bersabda: "Haidmu bukan di tanganmu."

517.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked: "O Messenger of Allah, will you remember your family on the Day of Resurrection?" He said: "As for three positions, no: the Book of Deeds, the Scale, and the Bridge."
517.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya: "Wahai Rasulullah, apakah engkau akan mengingat keluargamu pada Hari Kiamat?" Beliau bersabda: "Adapun tiga keadaan, tidak: ketika kitab amal, timbangan, dan jembatan (Shiratal-Mustaqim)."

518.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked: "Where will people be on the Day when the earth is replaced by another earth and the heavens?" He said: "This is something no one from my ummah has asked me about before you. They will be on the Bridge."
518.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya: "Di manakah manusia berada pada hari ketika bumi diganti dengan bumi yang lain dan langit?" Beliau bersabda: "Ini adalah sesuatu yang belum pernah ditanyakan kepadaku oleh seorang pun dari umatku sebelummu. Mereka akan berada di atas jembatan (Shiratal-Mustaqim)."

519.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not pray in our undergarments."
519.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ tidak shalat dengan mengenakan pakaian dalam kami."

520.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would spend the day fasting, then kiss my face as he wished until he broke his fast."
520.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ menghabiskan hari dalam keadaan berpuasa, kemudian mencium wajahku sesukanya hingga beliau berbuka."

521.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed the ritual bath for sexual impurity, he would run his fingers through his hair and work down to the roots until he was satisfied that all the skin was reached, then pour water over his head three times, then bathe. 'Urwah added: he would begin by washing his hands and then his private part.
521.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ mandi junub, beliau memasukkan jari-jarinya ke rambut dan menelusuri hingga akar-akarnya sampai merasa yakin semua kulit telah terjangkau, kemudian menuangkan air ke atas kepalanya tiga kali, lalu mandi. 'Urwah menambahkan: beliau memulai dengan mencuci tangannya lalu kemaluannya.

522.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to watch the water dripping down his skin and hair as he bathed, then I would hear him reciting for the Fajr prayer, and he would spend the day fasting."
522.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa melihat air menetes di kulitnya dan rambutnya saat beliau mandi, kemudian aku mendengar beliau membaca untuk shalat Subuh, dan beliau menghabiskan hari dalam keadaan berpuasa."

523.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked about washing semen from a garment, she said: "I have seen myself — when semen reached the garment of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, he would do no more than this," and she described him scraping it off with one hand against the other.
523.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya tentang mencuci air mani dari pakaian, ia berkata: "Aku telah melihat diriku sendiri — ketika air mani mengenai pakaian Rasulullah ﷺ, beliau tidak lebih dari melakukan ini," dan ia menggambarkan beliau menggaruknya dengan satu tangan ke tangan lainnya.

524.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The pen has been lifted from the sleeping person until he wakes, from the mentally impaired person until he regains his reason, and from the insane person until he regains his reason."
524.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Pena telah diangkat dari orang yang tidur hingga ia bangun, dari orang yang lemah akalnya hingga ia kembali normal, dan dari orang gila hingga ia kembali waras."

525.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a gift was presented to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, which included a necklace made of beads. He said: "I will give it to the one most beloved to me among my family." The women said: "It went to the daughter of Abu Quhafah." But the Prophet ﷺ called Umamah bint Zaynab and placed it around her neck.
525.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa sebuah hadiah dipersembahkan kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, yang di dalamnya terdapat kalung yang terbuat dari manik-manik. Beliau bersabda: "Aku akan memberikannya kepada orang yang paling aku cintai di antara keluargaku." Para wanita berkata: "Pasti untuk putri Abu Quhafah." Tetapi Nabi ﷺ memanggil Umamah bint Zaynab dan mengalungkannya di lehernya.

526.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ go out for prayer with water dripping from his head — he had been in a state of ritual impurity and had bathed while intending to fast."
526.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ keluar untuk shalat dengan air menetes dari kepalanya — beliau telah junub dan mandi dalam keadaan berniat puasa."

527.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she described the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: when he woke before the call to prayer, he would attend to his needs and then rise before touching any water. At the first call to prayer, he would rise swiftly. If he had not been in a state of ritual impurity, he would perform ablution as a man would for prayer and then pray two rak'ahs.
527.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menggambarkan Rasulullah ﷺ: ketika beliau bangun sebelum adzan, beliau mengurus kebutuhannya lalu bangkit sebelum menyentuh air. Pada adzan pertama, beliau langsung bangkit dengan cepat. Jika beliau tidak dalam keadaan junub, beliau berwudhu seperti wudhu laki-laki untuk shalat lalu shalat dua rakaat.

528.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked whether the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had forbidden keeping sacrificial meat after three days, she said: "No. But in those days not many people would offer sacrifices, so he ordered that to feed those who had sacrificed to those who had not. Later I saw us storing the shin from our sacrifices and eating it after ten days."
528.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya apakah Rasulullah ﷺ melarang menyimpan daging kurban lebih dari tiga hari, ia berkata: "Tidak. Tetapi pada saat itu tidak banyak orang yang berkurban, maka beliau memerintahkan agar memberi makan orang yang berkurban kepada yang tidak berkurban. Kemudian aku lihat kami menyimpan kaki dari kurban kami dan memakannya setelah sepuluh hari."

529.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she described the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: he would revive the first part of the night and the last part of it, and if he had a need with his family he would sleep before touching water. At the first call to prayer he would rise swiftly. If he had not been in a state of ritual impurity, he would perform ablution as a man would for prayer.
529.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menggambarkan Rasulullah ﷺ: beliau menghidupkan awal malam dan akhirnya, dan jika beliau memiliki keperluan dengan keluarganya beliau tidur sebelum menyentuh air. Pada adzan pertama beliau langsung bangkit. Jika beliau tidak dalam keadaan junub, beliau berwudhu seperti wudhu laki-laki untuk shalat.

530.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Were it not that your people have only recently left disbelief, I would demolish the Ka'bah and give it two doors at ground level — one for entering and one for exiting." Ibn al-Zubayr said: "And I saw him do exactly that."
530.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Seandainya bukan karena kaummu baru saja meninggalkan kekufuran, aku akan meruntuhkan Ka'bah dan memberinya dua pintu setinggi tanah — satu untuk masuk dan satu untuk keluar." Ibnu al-Zubayr berkata: "Dan aku melihat beliau melakukan persis itu."

531.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when performing i'tikaf, would not leave any need he had with his wife unattended until the pilgrims returned.
531.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ketika beri'tikaf, tidak meninggalkan kebutuhan yang ia miliki dengan istrinya hingga para jamaah haji kembali.

532.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the Mother of the Believers, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whatever is forbidden due to kinship is also forbidden due to fosterage — whether it is an uncle, a paternal uncle, or a nephew."
532.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), Ummul Mukminin, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Apa yang diharamkan karena nasab juga diharamkan karena sesusuan — baik itu paman dari pihak ibu, paman dari pihak ayah, maupun keponakan."

533.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when someone said "So-and-so has died and is now at rest," the Messenger of Allah ﷺ became angry and said: "Only those who have been forgiven are truly at rest."
533.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika seseorang berkata 'Si fulan telah meninggal dan kini beristirahat,' Rasulullah ﷺ marah dan bersabda: "Hanya orang yang telah diampuni yang benar-benar beristirahat."

534.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wished to sleep while in a state of ritual impurity, he would perform ablution as he would for prayer. And when he wished to eat or drink, he would wash his hands and then eat or drink if he wished."
534.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ ingin tidur dalam keadaan junub, beliau berwudhu seperti wudhu untuk shalat. Dan ketika ingin makan atau minum, beliau mencuci tangannya lalu makan atau minum jika mau."

535.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray thirteen prostrations at night. Most of his prayer was standing, but when he grew older and heavier, most of his prayer was sitting. He would pray while she lay across in front of him on the bed on which he slept.
535.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat tiga belas sujud di malam hari. Sebagian besar shalatnya dalam keadaan berdiri, tetapi ketika beliau bertambah tua dan berat, sebagian besar shalatnya dalam keadaan duduk. Beliau shalat sementara ia berbaring melintang di depannya di atas tempat tidur tempat beliau tidur.

536.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "On the Day of Resurrection, no one will be questioned thoroughly and then forgiven. The Muslim will see his deeds in his grave, and Allah the Almighty says: 'On that Day, no human or jinn will be asked about his sin. The criminals will be recognized by their marks.'"
536.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Pada Hari Kiamat, tidak ada seorang pun yang diperiksa secara menyeluruh kemudian diampuni. Seorang Muslim akan melihat amalnya di kubur, dan Allah Yang Maha Mulia berfirman: 'Pada hari itu, tidak ada manusia maupun jin yang ditanya tentang dosanya. Para penjahat akan dikenali dari tanda-tanda mereka.'"

537.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to sleep while in a state of ritual impurity, having performed ablution as for prayer.
537.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa tidur dalam keadaan junub setelah berwudhu seperti wudhu untuk shalat.

538.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she hung a curtain with pictures. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came to enter, he looked at it and tore it. She then took it and made two cushions from it, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to lean on them.
538.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menggantung tirai bergambar. Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ datang untuk masuk, beliau melihatnya dan merobeknya. Ia kemudian mengambilnya dan membuat dua bantal darinya, dan Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bersandar padanya.

539.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked: "Did you used to bathe together with the Prophet ﷺ?" She said: "Yes, I used to bathe together with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from a single vessel."
539.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya: "Apakah kamu biasa mandi bersama Nabi ﷺ?" Ia berkata: "Ya, aku biasa mandi bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dari satu wadah."

540.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when revelation would come to the Prophet ﷺ, he would enter a state resembling unconsciousness. While he was sitting with her, revelation descended, and when he lifted his head while wiping his forehead, he said: "Rejoice, O Aisha!" She replied: "By the grace of Allah, not by your praise." He then recited: "Those who accuse chaste women…" until he reached: "They are innocent of what they say."
540.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika wahyu datang kepada Nabi ﷺ, beliau memasuki keadaan seperti pingsan. Sementara beliau duduk bersamanya, wahyu turun, dan ketika beliau mengangkat kepalanya sambil mengusap dahinya, beliau bersabda: "Bergembiralah, wahai Aisyah!" Ia menjawab: "Dengan karunia Allah, bukan dengan pujianmu." Beliau kemudian membaca: "Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang menuduh wanita-wanita yang baik…" hingga sampai: "Mereka terbebas dari apa yang mereka ucapkan."

541.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When the verse of choice was revealed, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me: 'I want to mention something to you, but do not decide anything until you consult your parents.' Then he recited the verse of choice. I said: 'I choose Allah the Almighty and His Messenger ﷺ.' The Prophet ﷺ was delighted by that."
541.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika ayat pilihan diturunkan, Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadaku: 'Aku ingin menyebutkan sesuatu kepadamu, tetapi jangan memutuskan apa pun sampai kamu berkonsultasi dengan kedua orang tuamu.' Kemudian beliau membacakan ayat pilihan. Aku berkata: 'Aku memilih Allah Yang Maha Mulia dan Rasul-Nya ﷺ.' Nabi ﷺ merasa gembira dengan hal itu."

542.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Wala (patronage) belongs to the one who emancipates."
542.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Wala (perwalian) adalah milik orang yang memerdekakan."

543.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to bathe together with the Prophet ﷺ from a single vessel, racing him to it, saying: 'Leave some for me, leave some for me.'"
543.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa mandi bersama Nabi ﷺ dari satu wadah, berebut dengannya, seraya berkata: 'Sisakan untukku, sisakan untukku.'"

544.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when a share from a lamb was sent to her from 'Abd al-Rahman ibn 'Awf, she said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'None will show compassion for you after me except those who are patient. May Allah give 'Abd al-Rahman ibn 'Awf to drink from the Salsabil of Paradise.'"
544.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika bagian dari seekor domba dikirim kepadanya dari Abdurrahman bin 'Awf, ia berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada yang akan berbelas kasih kepada kalian setelahku kecuali orang-orang yang sabar. Semoga Allah memberi minum Abdurrahman bin 'Awf dari mata air Salsabil surga.'"

545.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said regarding cutting the hand: "The hand is cut for a quarter dinar or more."
545.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda mengenai potong tangan: "Tangan dipotong karena seperempat dinar atau lebih."

546.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ entered in a state of ihram for Hajj.
546.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ masuk dalam keadaan ihram untuk haji.

547.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite the Mu'awwidhat over himself and blow. When he fell ill, she began to recite them over him and wipe him with his own hand, hoping for the blessing of his hand.
547.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membaca al-Mu'awwidhat atas dirinya sendiri dan meniupnya. Ketika beliau sakit, ia mulai membacakannya atas beliau dan mengusapnya dengan tangan beliau sendiri, berharap mendapat berkah tangan beliau.

548.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed Hajj as ifrad (Hajj only).
548.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melaksanakan haji secara ifrad (haji saja).

549.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ commanded that use be made of the hides of animals that die naturally, once they have been tanned.
549.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan agar kulit hewan yang mati secara alami dapat dimanfaatkan, setelah disamak.

550.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to comb the hair of the Prophet ﷺ while he was in i'tikaf. He would not enter the house except for what a person must do."
550.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa menyisir rambut Nabi ﷺ sementara beliau beri'tikaf. Beliau tidak masuk ke dalam rumah kecuali untuk keperluan yang harus dilakukan seseorang."
